# Claude Code (Fork by Dek1MillionToken)

> Multi-provider AI coding CLI with Kanban task orchestration, plugin system, and subagent support. Supports Anthropic, OpenAI, Google Gemini, OpenRouter, and local Ollama.

---

## Quick Navigation

| Category | Link |
|----------|------|
| Setup & Install | [README.md](README.md) В· [docs/DEVELOPMENT.md](docs/DEVELOPMENT.md) |
| Configuration | [docs/CONFIGURATION.md](docs/CONFIGURATION.md) В· [docs/INSEARCH_SETUP.md](docs/INSEARCH_SETUP.md) |
| Architecture | [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) В· [docs/API.md](docs/API.md) |
| Commands | [docs/COMMANDS.md](docs/COMMANDS.md) |
| Kanban | [docs/kanban-agent-runtime.md](docs/kanban-agent-runtime.md) В· [docs/kanban-workers.md](docs/kanban-workers.md) |
| AI Assistant | [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md) |
| Testing | [docs/TESTING.md](docs/TESTING.md) |
| Troubleshooting | [docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md](docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md) В· [docs/USAGE.md](docs/USAGE.md) |

---

## Setup

### Installation

```bash
git clone https://github.com/JonusNattapong/ClaudeCode.git
cd claude-code
bun install
```

### Environment Variables

```bash
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="..."   # Anthropic Claude
export OPENAI_API_KEY="..."      # OpenAI GPT
export GOOGLE_API_KEY="..."      # Google Gemini
export OPENROUTER_API_KEY="..."  # OpenRouter
```

### Running

```bash
bun run src/main.tsx session   # Start a CLI session
bun run dev                    # Dev mode with --watch
bun run build                  # Production build -> dist/
```

---

## Architecture

### High-Level System

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ                        Terminal UI                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                     (Ink / React / TUI)                     в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ                    Command Handler Layer                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  Files   в”Ӯ в”Ӯ   Git    в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  MCP     в”Ӯ в”Ӯ   Agent      в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ Commands в”Ӯ в”ӮCommands  в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Servers  в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  System      в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ                    AI Provider Layer                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ӮAnthropic в”Ӯ в”Ӯ OpenAI   в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Google   в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  OpenRouter  в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ӮProvider  в”Ӯ в”ӮProvider  в”Ӯ в”ӮProvider  в”Ӯ в”Ӯ   Provider   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ                    Core Services                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ӮProvider  в”Ӯ в”ӮSession   в”Ӯ в”ӮPermissionв”Ӯ в”Ӯ   Plugin     в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ӮRegistry  в”Ӯ в”ӮManager   в”Ӯ в”ӮManager   в”Ӯ в”Ӯ   Manager    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ                    Data & Storage                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ~/.claude/в”Ӯ в”ӮSession   в”Ӯ в”ӮSettings  в”Ӯ в”Ӯ   Cache      в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ӮSessions  в”Ӯ в”ӮTranscriptв”Ӯ в”Ӯ(JSON)    в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  (5-min)     в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### AI Provider System (`src/services/ai/`)

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `providerRegistry.ts` | Singleton registry for all providers |
| `ProviderManager.ts` | Orchestrates API keys, model selection, streaming, token usage |
| `providers/` | One file per provider (AnthropicAdapter, ChatGPTSessionProvider, OpenAICompatibleProvider, etc.) |
| `providerModels.ts` | Model discovery with 5-minute cache |
| Provider interface | `streamMsg()`, `nonStreamingMsg()`, `getModels()`, `getToolResultSchema()` |

### Tool System (`src/infra/tools/`)

Each tool exports: `name`, `description`, `parameters` (Zod schema), `isEnabled()`, `userFacingName()`, `renderToolUse()`, `execute()`.

**Built-in tools:** `Read`, `Edit`, `Write`, `Glob`, `Grep`, `Bash`, `PowerShell`, `Git`, `WebFetch`, `WebSearch`, `Agent`, `Task`, `MCP`, `LSP`, `Skill`

### Plugin System (`src/plugins/`)

```
plugin-name/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ .claude-plugin/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ plugin.json     # Manifest
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ skills/         # Skill implementations
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ hooks/          # Hook handlers
в”ңв”Җв”Җ marketplace.json
в””в”Җв”Җ README.md
```

**Hook points:** `PreToolUse`, `PostToolUse`, `PreBash`, `PostPrompt`, `PreAcceptEdit`

### Bridge Mode (`src/bridge/`)

Remote collaboration via WebSocket. Enables sharing session URLs with teammates and remote control.

### Data Flow

```
Messaging Channels (WhatsApp/Telegram/Slack/etc.)
           в”Ӯ
           в–ј
    Gateway (WebSocket Control Plane)
           в”Ӯ
    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
    в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ
    в–ј       в–ј       в–ј            в–ј
 Agent   CLI    Web UI      macOS App
 (Pi)   (TS)   (Hono)     (SwiftUI)
```

---

## Kanban System (`src/utils/kanban/`)

The Kanban system is a persistent task board with HTTP dashboard and autonomous worker support.

### Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `kanban.ts` | Core CRUD operations (add, move, edit, block, delete) |
| `store.ts` | JSON file I/O (`tasks.json`, `events.json`) |
| `server.ts` | HTTP server with HTML dashboard + REST API |
| `types.ts` | Shared types (`Task`, `TaskEvent`, `TaskStatus`) |
| `worker.ts` | Worker runtime: claim, execute, verify, complete |
| `workers.ts` | Durable worker registry (`workers.json`) |
| `validation.ts` | Task validation (dependencies, cycles, blocks) |
| `markdown.ts` | Markdown rendering for task descriptions |
| `agentRuntime.ts` | Helper to expose Kanban as an agent runtime |
| `index.ts` | Barrel export |

### Dashboard & API

```bash
bun run src/utils/kanban/server.ts    # Start dashboard on http://localhost:3000
# or use /kanban server CLI command
```

**API Endpoints:** `GET /api/tasks`, `POST /api/tasks`, `GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/tasks/:id`, `POST /api/tasks/:id/claim`, `POST /api/tasks/:id/events`, `POST /api/tasks/claim-next`, `GET /api/tasks/:id/artifacts`, `POST /api/tasks/:id/artifacts` (generate), `POST /api/tasks/:id/artifacts/:artifactId` (select).

### Artifact System

Workers can generate artifacts (outputs, checkpoints, logs, etc.) on tasks. Artifacts are versioned, with one marked as `isCurrent`.

```bash
/kanban artifact list <taskId>       # List all artifacts (newest first)
/kanban artifact current <taskId>   # Show the current artifact
/kanban artifact select <taskId> <artifactId>  # Select a different version as current
```

### Worker System

Workers can run autonomously via `/kanban worker` CLI command. They register in `.kanban/workers.json`, send heartbeats, claim tasks, and report results.

```bash
/kanban worker --worker builder --loop --statuses ready,todo --cmd-argv '["bun","run","build"]'
/kanban workers                        # List registered workers
/kanban worker heartbeat <taskId> [workerId]   # Send heartbeat to extend lease
/kanban worker recover-stale           # Recover all stale/expired leases
/kanban worker fail <taskId> --reason "msg" [workerId]  # Fail a claimed task
/kanban worker --worker w1 --once --lease-minutes 5  # Custom lease TTL (5 min)
```

### Lease System

Each claimed task gets a lease with a configurable TTL (default 120s). Workers send heartbeats to extend the lease.

- **Active lease blocks other workers**: tasks with non-expired leases from another worker cannot be claimed
- **Same worker re-claim**: re-claiming your own lease extends it (heartbeat-like)
- **Expired leases**: can be reclaimed by any worker or recovered via `recover-stale`
- **Terminal state protection**: done/archived/fully-failed tasks cannot be claimed
- **Fail clears lease**: failing a task releases its lease and increments the retry attempt counter

### Subagent Lifecycle Integration (Phase 4)

Subagents now automatically create, update, and complete linked kanban tasks:

- Auto-create kanban task when subagent starts, inherit parent kanban task id
- Post progress comments to linked kanban task every 45 seconds
- Auto-complete kanban task when subagent succeeds with tool/token counts
- Auto-fail kanban task when subagent errors, recording error details

### Agent Runtime Protocol

```
ready/todo task
    в”Ӯ
    в–ј
  claim в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
    в”Ӯ                                в”Ӯ
    в–ј                                в”Ӯ
  heartbeat loop (every 30s)         в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ                                в”Ӯ
    в–ј                                в”Ӯ
  work / execute                     в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ                                в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ add evidence                 в”Ӯ
    в–ј                                в”Ӯ
  verify                             в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ                                в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң“ all pass вҶ’ complete в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң— some fail вҶ’ fail в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
    в””в”Җв”Җ missing evidence вҶ’ review в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
```

**Required Protocol Commands:**

| Command | Function | HTTP Endpoint |
|---------|----------|---------------|
| Find claimable tasks | `findClaimableTasks()` | `GET /api/tasks` |
| Claim next task | `claimNextTask()` | `POST /api/tasks/claim-next` |
| Heartbeat | `heartbeatKanbanTask()` | `POST /api/tasks/:id/heartbeat` |

---

## Commands Reference

### Session & Model Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/model` | Switch AI model (opens model picker) |
| `/provider` | Manage AI provider (list, set, configure keys) |
| `/resume` | Resume a previous session |
| `/continue` | Continue the most recent session |
| `/new` | Start a fresh conversation |
| `/exit` | Exit the current session |
| `/rename` | Rename the current session |
| `/fork` | Fork current conversation into a new session |
| `/save` | Save current session with custom name |

### Configuration Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/config` | Open settings editor |
| `/theme` | Change color theme |
| `/color` | Change session accent color |
| `/help` | Show help & keybindings |
| `/status` | Show system status |
| `/doctor` | Run diagnostics & fix issues |
| `/compact` | Manually trigger context compaction |
| `/effort` | Adjust thinking effort level |

### Tool Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/cost` | Show token usage & cost |
| `/context` | Show context window usage |
| `/diff` | View git diff of current changes |
| `/commit` | Create a git commit |
| `/commit-push-pr` | Commit, push, and create PR |
| `/branch` | Create a new git branch with session |
| `/files` | Browse project files |
| `/kanban` | Kanban board management (init, list, show, add, move, edit, delete, block, complete, fail, verify, evidence, events, worker, workers, artifact list/current/select, etc.) |

### Agent Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/agents` | Manage AI agents |
| `/agent` | Spawn a sub-agent for a task |
| `/advisor` | Request AI advice on current task |
| `/ultraplan` | Ultra-deep planning mode |
| `/ultrareview` | Comprehensive code review |
| `/kanban` | Coordinate multi-step or multi-agent work |

### Plugin & Skill Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/plugin` | Plugin marketplace & management |
| `/skills` | Skills management |
| `/reload-plugins` | Reload all plugins |
| `/update` | Check for & apply updates |

### Bridge & Remote Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/bridge` | Enter bridge mode (remote collaboration) |
| `/remote-control` | Enable remote control from web |
| `/team-onboarding` | Generate team onboarding guide |

### MCP Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/mcp` | MCP server management |
| `/mcp-serve` | Start an MCP server |

---

## Project Structure

```
src/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ main.tsx                    # CLI entry point & bootstrap
в”ңв”Җв”Җ cli/                        # React/Ink TUI components
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ App.tsx                 # Root React component
в”ңв”Җв”Җ commands/                   # 100+ slash commands (each in own dir)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ services/ai/                # Multi-provider system
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ providerRegistry.ts     # Singleton registry
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ProviderManager.ts      # Orchestration
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ providers/              # Per-provider adapters
в”ңв”Җв”Җ infra/tools/                # 40+ built-in tools
в”ңв”Җв”Җ utils/kanban/               # Task board system
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ kanban.ts               # Core CRUD
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ store.ts                # JSON persistence
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ server.ts               # HTTP dashboard + REST API
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ worker.ts               # Worker runtime
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ workers.ts              # Worker registry
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ validation.ts           # Dependency/cycle validation
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ markdown.ts             # Markdown rendering
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ agentRuntime.ts         # Agent runtime bridge
в”ңв”Җв”Җ tasks/                      # Task framework
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ LocalAgentTask/          # Subagent lifecycle + kanban integration
в”ңв”Җв”Җ plugins/                    # Plugin system
в”ңв”Җв”Җ bridge/                     # WebSocket remote collaboration
в”ңв”Җв”Җ browser/                    # Browser automation via CDP
в”ңв”Җв”Җ node-host/                  # Device node integration (macOS/iOS/Android)
в””в”Җв”Җ web/                        # Web UI surfaces
```

---

## Development

### Build Commands

```bash
bun install              # Install dependencies
bun run build            # Production build -> dist/
bun run dev              # Dev mode with --watch
bun test                 # Run all tests
bun x tsc --noEmit       # TypeScript type check
```

### Testing

```bash
bun test                           # All tests
bun test src/utils/kanban/         # Kanban tests only
bun test src/utils/kanban/kanban.test.ts  # Specific test file
bun test --coverage               # With coverage (70% threshold)
```

### Key Files & Entry Points

- **`src/main.tsx`** вҖ” Main CLI entry point with Commander program
- **`src/cli/App.tsx`** вҖ” Root React/Ink component
- **`src/commands/`** вҖ” 100+ slash commands
- **`src/services/ai/`** вҖ” Multi-provider system
- **`src/infra/tools/`** вҖ” 40+ built-in tools
- **`src/utils/kanban/`** вҖ” Kanban board system

---

## Troubleshooting

### Windows CRLF Issue

On Windows, the Edit tool converts files to CRLF. Bun's QuickJS TS parser treats `\r\n` as a single terminator, corrupting template literals. If you see "Unexpected end of file" errors, use Python to strip `\r`:

```bash
python -c "import sys; data=open('file.ts','rb').read(); open('file.ts','wb').write(data.replace(b'\r',b''))"
```

### Common Diagnostics

```bash
DEBUG=1 bun run src/main.tsx session     # Debug logging
DEBUG=provider:anthropic bun run src/main.tsx session  # Provider debug
/status    # Show internal state
/doctor    # Run diagnostics & auto-fix
/context   # View context window usage
```

### Runtime Requirements

- **Node.js**: 18+ (22+ recommended) or **Bun** 1.0+
- **TypeScript**: ESM with NodeNext module resolution
- **Test Framework**: Vitest (Bun's test runner)

---

- [docs/NOTICE.md](docs/NOTICE.md) вҖ” Source code liberation notice (read first)
